start.title: What's Your Dopamine Type?
start.subtitle: Discover how your brain's reward system shapes your personality

share.text: My dopamine type is {type}! What's yours?

q.0: What energizes you most on a weekend?
q.0b: A deep focus project or learning session
q.0c: A big social gathering with friends
q.1: How do you approach a new challenge?
q.1a: Set competitive goals and push hard
q.1b: Explore all angles before diving in
q.1c: Jump in head-first, figure it out later
q.1d: Plan carefully and stick to what's safe
q.2: What kind of content hooks you?
q.3b: Party city with a big group of friends
q.4: What motivates you at work or school?
q.4d: A stable routine and comfortable environment
q.5b: Talk it out with friends or family
q.5d: Try something completely new and different
q.7a: Winning a competition or achieving a goal
q.7b: A perfect cozy evening with comfort food
q.7c: Making everyone laugh at a gathering
q.7d: Discovering something no one else knows

thrillSeeker.name: Thrill Seeker
thrillSeeker.desc: Your brain craves intensity and adrenaline. You're drawn to extreme experiences, high-stakes situations, and the rush of pushing boundaries. Your dopamine spikes hardest when you're living on the edge.

deepDiver.name: Deep Diver
deepDiver.desc: Your brain rewards deep focus and mastery. You get your biggest dopamine hits from losing yourself in complex problems, learning new skills, and achieving expertise. Quality over quantity, always.

socialSpark.name: Social Spark
socialSpark.desc: Your brain lights up through human connection. Social interactions, making others laugh, and being part of a vibrant group are your dopamine fuel. You're energized by the energy of others.

comfortCreator.name: Comfort Creator
comfortCreator.desc: Your brain finds reward in stability and routine. You get steady dopamine from cozy environments, familiar rituals, and creating a safe, comfortable world. Your calm is your superpower.

challengeChaser.name: Challenge Chaser
challengeChaser.desc: Your brain is wired for competition and achievement. Rankings, targets, and beating personal bests flood your dopamine system. You turn everything into a challenge — and you love winning.

noveltyHunter.name: Novelty Hunter
noveltyHunter.desc: Your brain is addicted to the new and unknown. Exploring uncharted territory, discovering hidden gems, and trying things nobody else has tried give you the ultimate dopamine rush.
